No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
Defendants Superior Court and Arlene Borick's demurrer to complaint - Judge Kahn is recusing himself from hearing any matter in this case. Barbara Compton will advise the parties of when and where the demurrer will be heard. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077= (302/HEK)
